---
name: Claude Confused-User Red Team
description: Weekly red-team report from a first-time/confused-user perspective
title: "red-team: confused-user run "
labels: ["enhancement", "challenge:new-user", "red-team"]
assignees: []
---

## Run Metadata

- Date:
- Repo ref/branch:
- Entry point used first (for example README):
- Time-to-first-value target (minutes):

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] Existing platform pattern path tested
- [ ] New platform rollout path tested
- [ ] At least one demo path tested

## Top Confusion Points (max 5)

1. confusion point + exact location
2. confusion point + exact location
3. confusion point + exact location
4. confusion point + exact location
5. confusion point + exact location

## Blockers Found

For each blocker include:

1. User intent
2. Exact repro steps
3. Expected vs actual
4. Minimal fix proposal
5. Affected story ID (`1..13`)

## First-Run Score

- Did a new user reach value in under 10 minutes? (`pass` or `fail`)
- Why:

## Follow-up Issues Created

- Link child issues opened from this run.
